strategy: Attack into Storm or Life. He takes +14% from both, resists Fire, Death, Balance, and Shadow only 6%, and resists Ice and Myth 26%, so pick Storm or Life.
Expect a hard opener. He casts Amplify on himself round 1 and any round he has no aura, boosting his next attack, so shield or keep resist up early.
Skip traps entirely. Any harmful ward on Ares triggers Immolate on you. Skip shields too, since a helpful ward gets the recipient hit with Fire Elf.
Stack blades instead. Charms do not trigger his cheats, so build damage over two or three rounds safely.
Finish with an AoE, not a single-target hit. A single-target damage spell makes him fire a free 0-pip natural attack back, and an AoE also clears the Ophidian Archer.
cheatNotes: Round 1 and any round he has no aura, Ares casts Amplify on himself to boost his next attack. Keep resist or a shield up.
Any trap or weakness you place on him triggers Immolate, a Fire DoT, on you. Skip traps and blade instead.
Any shield or helpful ward you cast gets the recipient hit with Fire Elf. Do not shield.
Hitting him with a single-target damage spell makes him retaliate with a free 0-pip natural attack. Use an AoE to avoid the counter.
